---
title: "Mrs Lyth"
---

## Mrs Lyth

### Description

missionary in Fiji

### Biography

She was wife of the medical missionary Richard Burdsall Lyth (1810-1887).  The incident when she and Mary (Fowler) Calvert successfully pleaded for the lives of 14 women who were to be killed and eaten is described in James Calvert, <i>Fiji and the Fijians</i> (1858, rpt Suva: Fiji Museum 2003) 290.

### Letters

- Letter from July 12th [1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
